name: [HIGH] CVE-2026-32280
statusMessage: During chain building, the amount of work that is done is not correctl ...
statusTrace: During chain building, the amount of work that is done is not correctly limited when a large number of intermediate certificates are passed in VerifyOptions.Intermediates, which can lead to a denial of service. This affects both direct users of crypto/x509 and users of crypto/tls.
